Senior Mechanical Design Engineer with 10 years of experience developing complex hardware across medical devices, electromechanical systems, consumer products, and DOE national lab programs.

I specialize in turning ambiguous product and manufacturing challenges into validated mechanical solutions, with experience spanning concept development, CAD, prototyping, FEA, tolerance analysis, testing, documentation, and first-article production. My work is strongest at the intersection of design, manufacturing, and validation, where thoughtful engineering decisions reduce risk and move hardware closer to production.
